--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Please advise.

Darren

Subject: Ohio Coffee, LLC
Date: Mon, 10 Apr 2006 16:00:21 -0400
From: "Jaffe, Dan L." DLJaffe@vssp.com
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
CC: "Cohen, Susan A." SACohen@vssp.com

Darren,

We received employment tax return stuff from the IRS
for this entity.
Do you want us to dissolve the LLC and tell the IRS
that the LLC never
conducted business, or is there still a chance that
the concept will be
revived? Any need to keep the name? Please let me
know.

Dan
